title: The World Government Erases a Kingdom
description: On pages 14–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Coby, Unknown person #15, Nami, Luffy as Luffy reveals his true dream to the crew while world events around Sabo, Lulusia, and the Government signal a dangerous new stage.
scene: Luffy reveals his true dream to the crew while world events around Sabo, Lulusia, and the Government signal a dangerous new stage.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, Nami!! What in the world is that?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: It's like a giant warm eddy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: An eddy current?! but it's going upward?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It must mean a mass of warm water is being forced up at this point from somewhere.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Oooh!! It looks like an afro j)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: A rapid temperature change is dangerous!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WE'VE GOITA RUN, JINBE!! WE'LL BE SWALLOWED UP!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Wait!! Somebody's trapped in the water!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How could anyone be alive in there? Is it a mermaid?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can definitely hear a lady in distress!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if someone's in there, what are we supposed to do?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You'd better not leave a scratch on the lady!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Hey, guys!! What's all the commotion?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Amigasa-hat chopper here, reporting for duty!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Chopper!! Why did you come out?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: One of worst generation "The Clinton" Jewelen Bonney County: 8:20 million

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: A Chance Meeting...?! But she's small...?!

summary: This part advances the New Era After Wano through 38 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
